info.title: Herald API
info.description: Realtime event transport with built-in authorization. Herald is a delivery layer, not a database — events are retained in an internal catch-up buffer (default 7-day TTL, configurable via `store.event_ttl_days`) for reconnect recovery, then pruned hourly. Requests for events older than the TTL return empty ranges silently. Long-term history, search, and audit belong in your application's own database.

get.summary: Get stats snapshots and today's summary.

delete.summary: GDPR: Purge ALL data for a tenant from all namespaces.

get.summary: List streams for a specific tenant (admin view).
Liveness probe -- always 200 if process is running.
Readiness probe -- checks storage and integration health.
GET /self/events/stream — SSE stream of tenant's events.

post.summary: POST /self/secret/rotate — rotate the tenant's secret, return new credentials.

get.summary: GET /self/tokens — list API tokens for the authenticated tenant.

post.summary: POST /self/tokens — create an API token for the authenticated tenant.

delete.summary: DELETE /self/tokens/{token} — revoke an API token for the authenticated tenant.

get.summary: Tenant-scoped stats endpoint. Returns snapshots for the authenticated tenant.

AdminSetPresenceRequest.description: Request body for admin presence override.

last_seen_at.description:
Unix milliseconds when the user was last seen (last disconnect).
Null when the user is currently online.

EventView.description: Event as returned by the list events API (field names differ from storage).
